login.heroSubtitle: Enter your Co-Money account and continue with the original app style.
login.title: SIGN IN
login.subtitle: Enter name or email and your password to continue.
login.identifierHelper: Only name (for example: mario) or full email address

errors.submit: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

register.heroSubtitle: Create your account and continue into the new Co-Money with the original app style.
register.title: REGISTER
register.subtitle: Use a real email address to receive the OTP code and complete registration.
register.emailHelper: Enter a real email address you can access.
register.passwordHelper: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.otpBody: After registration, we will send an OTP to your real email to complete activation.

errors.submit: We couldn't complete your registration. Please try again.
errors.firstNameShort: First name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.lastNameShort: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

verifyEmail.heroSubtitle: Confirm your registration with the code sent to your email inbox.
verifyEmail.title: VERIFY
verifyEmail.subtitle: We sent a verification code to:
verifyEmail.resendCountdown: Didn't receive the code? Resend in 00:{{time}}

success.title: Account created
success.subtitle: Your email is verified and your workspace is ready.
success.body: You can now continue into the app and complete the rest of your profile from inside your dashboard.

home.title: Dashboard
home.subtitle: Co-Money
home.fetchWarning: Could not fetch users, make sure backend is running

dashboard.bannerSubtitle: {{section}} for your wallet, transactions, and daily actions.

customer.subtitle: Your wallet is ready for earning and spending across local shops.

representative.shopManagementSubtitle: Representatives can add, update, activate, and deactivate shop records

admin.recentCustomersSubtitle: Newest customer accounts in the network

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Customer-role accounts available for point assignment
customers.searchLabel: Search by name, username, or email
customers.searchHelper: Filter the customer list to find the right wallet faster.
customers.empty: No customer-role users match your search.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Track earn and spend activity
transactions.empty: No transactions match the current filters.

password.title: Change Password
password.subtitle: Update your sign-in password from the profile section
password.currentHelper: Enter your existing password before choosing a new one.
password.newHelper: Use at least 8 characters for the new password.
password.confirmHelper: Re-enter the new password to confirm the change.

shopForm.nameHelper: Use the public-facing shop name customers will recognize.
shopForm.locationHelper: Add the branch area or address shown in the shop listing.
shopForm.descriptionHelper: Write a short summary about what this shop offers.

managedShops.title: Managed Shops
managedShops.subtitle: Add, update, activate, or deactivate assigned shops

promotions.editSubtitle: Create shop offers and bonus campaigns
promotions.titleHelper: Choose a clear campaign name customers can scan quickly.
promotions.descriptionHelper: Explain the offer, reward, or eligibility in one short note.
promotions.bonusHelper: Enter the extra reward points granted by this promotion.
promotions.startHelper: Choose when this promotion should become active.
promotions.endHelper: Choose the last day customers can use this promotion.
promotions.empty: No promotions are available right now.

events.titleHelper: Use the event name that should appear in announcements.
events.descriptionHelper: Add a short agenda, purpose, or event summary.
events.locationHelper: Mention the venue, branch, or meetup point.
events.startHelper: Pick the first day this event will be visible as active.
events.endHelper: Pick the final day for this event schedule.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Create internal and managed accounts
users.firstNameHelper: Enter the user's given name for their profile.
users.lastNameHelper: Enter the surname used for reporting and account records.
users.usernameHelper: Use a unique sign-in name without spaces.
users.emailHelper: Add the email address used for login and notifications.
users.passwordHelper: Set a temporary password with at least 8 characters.

admin.shopManagementSubtitle: Admins can add, update, activate, and deactivate shop records

customerQr.title: Customer QR
customerQr.subtitle: Show this code to a merchant to identify your wallet securely.
customerQr.sheetSubtitle: Refresh anytime to generate a fresh short-lived QR.

merchantScan.title: Scan Customer
merchantScan.subtitle: Scan QR to verify a customer and jump back into the add-points flow.
merchantScan.permissionSubtitle: Camera access is required to verify a customer QR.
merchantScan.permissionText: Allow camera access to scan customer QR codes.
merchantScan.sheetSubtitle: Align the customer QR inside the frame to fetch the wallet details.
merchantScan.ready: Ready to scan a customer wallet.

addPoints.chooseCustomerHint: Choose a customer below or from the Customers tab.
addPoints.noShops: No merchant shop is available for point assignment.

fields.pointsHelper: Enter how many points should be added to the customer wallet.
fields.descriptionHelper: Add an optional note explaining why these points were issued.
fields.purchaseAmountHelper: Enter the bill total before discounts are applied.
fields.redeemPointsHelper: Enter how many customer points should be redeemed.
fields.settlementDescriptionHelper: Add an optional note for the purchase or redemption context.

earn.title: Add Points
earn.subtitle: Merchant earn transaction for a customer

spend.title: Accept Points
spend.subtitle: Settle a purchase with discount, payable amount, and new points
spend.helper: Same-shop restriction is enforced automatically and discounts are capped at 30% of the purchase.

apiErrors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
apiErrors.otpResent: OTP code was resent to your email.
apiErrors.emailNotFound: We couldn't find an account with that email.
apiErrors.passwordIncorrect: The password you entered is incorrect.
apiErrors.verificationEmailFailed: We could not send the verification email right now.
apiErrors.networkUnavailable: We couldn't reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
apiErrors.requestTimedOut: The request took too long. Please try again.
